name: Broiled Chicken Creole
recipeIngredient: 3 To 4 Green Bell Peppers, cut in strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Quarter the chicken lengthwise and slice.
2. Turn on the broiler to heat.
3. Place the chicken in an ovenproof pan and sprinkle with herbs and paprika. Be liberal with the paprika.
4. Place the chicken parts, bone side up, in the pan and sprinkle the vegetables around the chicken, tucking them into any available spaces.
5. Dot the chicken and vegetables with butter.
6. Place the pan under the preheated broiler and cook for 10 minutes.
7. Turn the chicken pieces over and baste the vegetables with juices. Return the pan to the broiler for an additional 10 minutes.
8. If the juices run pink when the chicken is pricked with a fork, reduce the temperature to 375°F and bake in the oven for 5-10 minutes. Otherwise, keep the dish warm until ready to serve.
9. Serve the chicken, vegetables, and gravy spooned over steamed rice (see separate recipe).
